## Chore: Summary

Describe the maintenance task (deps, refactor, tooling, docs) and motivation.

Related to: #<issue-id> (optional)

## Changes
- What changed and why

## Tests
- [ ] Existing tests pass
- [ ] Added tests if behavior changed

## Checklist

- [ ] Lint/format OK
- [ ] Docs updated if user‑visible changes
- [ ] No secrets committed
